title: WildFly Security Domain Authentication Failures
dataSources: `index=web` `sourcetype=wildfly:audit` (WildFly Elytron / legacy security audit JSON or key-value logs)
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder; Splunk Add-on for JMX (`Splunk_TA_jmx`); file monitoring for `jboss:server`, structured audit for `wildfly:audit`
spl:
index=web sourcetype="wildfly:audit"
| search outcome="failure" OR outcome="denied"
| stats count by security_domain, principal, module
| where count > 20
description: Elytron audit records document authentication outcomes for regulated apps. Clustering denials by domain highlights misconfigured clients or brute force.
value: Supports identity governance and SOC investigations.
implementation: Enable `audit-log` in Elytron; forward JSON to HEC with `wildfly:audit`. Enrich principal with IdP username mapping.
visualization: Time series for pool/queue metrics, top stats for failures, event timeline for deploys.
grandmaExplanation: We track failed logins and authz denials on WildFly-managed applications.
